methods.name: minio_storage.minio_storage.minio_storage.__init__
documentation:
Create manager for minio

Parameters
----------
endpoint : str
    console endpoint for minio.
access_key : str
    access key generated by access policy.
secret_key : str
    secret key come along the generated access policy.

Returns
-------
None.

methods.name: minio_storage.minio_storage.minio_storage.connect_storage
documentation:
Attempt to connect to minio server

Returns
-------
bool
    Return True upon success connect, False otherwise.

methods.name: minio_storage.minio_storage.minio_storage.is_storage_connected
documentation:
Verify if storage connected.

Returns
-------
bool
    Return True upon success connect, False otherwise.

methods.name: minio_storage.minio_storage.minio_storage.upload_file
documentation:
Upload a file

Parameters
----------
bucket_name : str
    bucket name of the storage to upload.
source_file : str
    source file path in local.
destination_file : str
    file path to save in minio.

Returns
-------
object_write_result : minio.ObjectWriteResult object
    write result object by minio api fput_object.
    In the event of failing, return None

methods.name: minio_storage.minio_storage.minio_storage.download_file_as_byte
documentation:
Download a file from minio as io.BytesIO object

Parameters
----------
bucket_name : str
    bucket name of the storage to download.
file_path : str
    file path of item to download in minio.

Returns
-------
filebytes : io.BytesIO
    return bytes if success, else, None.

methods.name: minio_storage.minio_storage.minio_storage.download_file
documentation:
Download a file from minio server to local

Parameters
----------
bucket_name : str
    bucket name of the storage to download.
file_path : str
    file path of item to download in minio.
save_path : str
    file path to save in local.

Returns
-------
bool
    True of success download, otherwise, False.

methods.name: minio_storage.minio_storage.minio_storage.remove_file
documentation:
Remove a file in minio server

Parameters
----------
bucket_name : str
    bucket name of the storage to download.
file_path : str
    file path of item to delete in minio.

Returns
-------
bool
    True of success download, otherwise, False.
